title: BEM-918 roadmap record
objective:
Create file governance/reports/BEM918_FULL_WORKING_SYSTEM_ROADMAP.md with content # BEM-918 FULL WORKING SYSTEM ROADMAP
Status: FULL_WORKING_SYSTEM_ROADMAP_APPROVED_WITH_OPERATOR_GATES
Date: 2026-05-30
Purpose: prepare a detailed implementation-focused roadmap to turn the repository from governance scaffold and partial deterministic baseline into a fully working system.
Operator clarification:
- Concepts are no longer enough.
- The repository already has a Telegram/Deno/Codex mechanism and it must be used.
- The whole system must become operational, not only Telegram.
Existing mechanism to use:
- Deno service: ai-devops-telegram-curator-webhook.
- Telegram webhook: POST /.
- Autonomy endpoints: /autonomy, /autonomy-trigger, /autonomy-backlog-trigger.
- GPT safe endpoints: /gpt-safe-run, /gpt-safe-status.
- Codex endpoints: /codex-task, /codex-status.
- Execution contour: ChatGPT -> /codex-task -> codex-runner.yml -> /codex-status.
Claude findings included as requirements:
- JSON-only agents must become runners/lifecycle.
- commit_sha null must be addressed by CI/Git proof hardening.
- Channel needs consumer and queue lifecycle.
- Self-validation must be reduced by deterministic tests and external proof.
- Architecture canon, event log, GD/DIR prompts and re-audit must be maintained.
Agreed roadmap:
1. BEM-919: repository technical inventory and SSOT map for existing Telegram/Deno/Codex implementation.
2. BEM-920: Telegram incoming parser and task envelope schema.
3. BEM-921: Telegram to General Director routing and managed-channel bridge.
4. BEM-922: canonical Telegram report pipeline with default 1-hour report configuration.
5. BEM-923: operator-gated production webhook/secrets/schedule/daemon decision.
6. BEM-924: deterministic dispatch consumer integration with Telegram-originated tasks.
7. BEM-925: GD/DIR/Worker object runner lifecycle and role reports.
8. BEM-926: CI/Git proof hardening and release-proof manifest.
9. BEM-927: Telegram E2E selftest from command to task completion to Telegram report mock.
10. BEM-928: Claude re-audit package after implementation.
